FAIR-band: under-target [6/30] — Self-Selection Rule 1 fires (under-band → bias toward author lane)

Resolves #10082

This PR strengthens the Tech Debt Radar by explicitly codifying the detection of Unbounded API Risks in `ai/services/*.mjs` and `ai/mcp/server/*/services/*.mjs`. It also adds a mandatory cross-reference in the `ticket-intake` workflow to ensure this sweep runs before accepting incoming feature tickets that introduce new data-structure-holding service methods.

Evidence: L1 (static rule structure / documentation update) → L1 required (no runtime-verify ACs). No residuals.

## Slot-Rationale (Substrate Mutation)
- `.agents/skills/tech-debt-radar/references/tech-debt-radar-guide.md`: Modified (delta). Added Unbounded-List API Detection section as a specific tactical sweep pattern in the conditionally-loaded reference atlas. Does not pollute the always-loaded SKILL.md map.
- `.agents/skills/ticket-intake/references/ticket-intake-workflow.md`: Modified (delta). Added the Unbounded-API Extension trigger to the existing Semantic Blast-Radius Sweep to invoke the tech debt check for new service methods. Exists in the conditionally-loaded reference atlas.

## Deltas from ticket (if any)
Added the new Unbounded-List API Detection section under the `tech-debt-radar` guide and updated `ticket-intake-workflow.md` to trigger it.

N/A - Pure documentation/substrate change.
